final_files.tests/test_final_transaction_recovery.py:
import pytest

from payments.journal import Journal, JournalWriteError
from payments.service import TransferService
from payments.wallet_store import InsufficientFunds, WalletStore


def make_service():
    wallets = WalletStore()
    wallets.create("settlement", 1000)
    wallets.create("quarantine", 25)
    journal = Journal()
    return wallets, journal, TransferService(wallets, journal)


def test_destination_outage_rolls_back_every_surface_then_allows_retry():
    wallets, journal, service = make_service()
    journal.blocked_destinations.add("quarantine")
    with pytest.raises(JournalWriteError):
        service.transfer("release-9", "settlement", "quarantine", 300)

    assert (wallets.balance("settlement"), wallets.balance("quarantine")) == (1000, 25)
    assert journal.entries_for("release-9") == []

    journal.blocked_destinations.remove("quarantine")
    committed = service.transfer("release-9", "settlement", "quarantine", 300)
    assert committed["status"] == "committed"
    assert (wallets.balance("settlement"), wallets.balance("quarantine")) == (700, 325)
    postings = journal.entries_for("release-9")
    assert len(postings) == 2
    assert sum(posting["delta"] for posting in postings) == 0


def test_replenished_wallet_can_reuse_an_initially_rejected_request_id():
    wallets, journal, service = make_service()
    with pytest.raises(InsufficientFunds):
        service.transfer("replenish-3", "settlement", "quarantine", 1400)
    wallets.deposit("settlement", 500)
    committed = service.transfer("replenish-3", "settlement", "quarantine", 1400)
    assert committed["status"] == "committed"
    assert (wallets.balance("settlement"), wallets.balance("quarantine")) == (100, 1425)
    assert len(journal.entries_for("replenish-3")) == 2
